name: Taco Tater
recipeIngredient: 1 large Potato, baked, split, and fluffed
1 Taco Meat Filling (Que Bueno Taco Sauce label recipe)
1 oz Chef-Mate Monterey Jack and Cheddar Cheese Sauce, heated
recipeInstructions:
1. In the split, fluffed baked potato, place the meat filling.
2. Ladle the cheese sauce over the potato.
3. Garnish with olives, tomato, and green onion.
4. Serve. Makes 1 potato.
Source: Carnation Company
